1768460.name: Cursed Letters: The Mansion
1768460.description:
By Aeternum Ludos.​

Forgotten traditions, forbidden secrets, and a legacy that should have never been uncovered... Cursed Letter is a slasher horror game with the nostalgic look of PS1 classics. Explore the past, unravel your family's mysteries, and try to survive—because something has awakened. And now, it’s hunting.

What if, after losing your father, you received a strange letter from your brother claiming he could bring your father back?

Step into the role of Robert Franklin, a young man haunted by guilt, as you relive the past and uncover your family’s dark secrets while searching for your missing brother. A grim and melancholic journey where nothing is as it seems. And no one is free from guilt.

The visuals of the game will bite back on your nostalgia for 80s and early 90s movies, as well as feeling unique on their own against other horror games in the genre. For that reason, we choose a mix between a (G)old “ps1-like” aesthetic alongside some more refined shaders, lighting, and effects.

​

You'll have to think carefully and use your mind to understand the rooms, paths, and hiding spots around you. To find a way out and prevent the enemies from taking you down.

A constant feeling of weakness will surround you, along with an always-present enemy. You'll have to improvise with your items and the tools you'll find around the levels, either by using them to make noises and attract enemies or disarm traps.

Contains intense violence, gore, and strong language.
